summary: Supply chain planning leader with 6+ years at Tetra Pak, across global replenishment operations, master scheduling, and cross-functional S&OP/IBP execution. I lead teams and budgets, and I build the automation and AI agents that take the repetitive work off the table. Beyond the day job I run Shetty's Desk, an agentic supply-chain content workflow built on Claude Code.

competencies.detail: IBP/S&OP, mid- and short-term planning, scenario modelling
Service-level management, working-capital balance, replenishment strategy
People development, budget ownership, performance management, KPI design
SAP ECC, SAP IBP, Microsoft Copilot Studio, Power BI, Excel

roles.title: Replenishment Manager, Planning & Quality (Services Supply Network)
roles.lesson: Owning the end-to-end at the scale of a global service network: right part, right place, right time.
highlights: Lead a team of 10 purchasing & sourcing specialists with full headcount and budget ownership: 450M+ EUR annual purchasing volume, 250,000+ purchase orders, and 150,000+ spare parts across 1,000+ suppliers globally.
Cut average sourcing lead time 20% on 1,500+ parts/year by securing direct CAD-drawing access; automating sourcing-case creation reduced backlog 45% post-implementation.
Rescued a stalled order-confirmation automation blocked by an SAP defect, driving it to resolution through IT; post go-live it saves ~9 hours/day, ~2,200 hours/year (≈1 FTE).

Built and deployed 'Optimus Prime at P&Q', an AI agent (Microsoft Copilot Studio) over our Quality Management System and 200+ work instructions for 50+ global users, cutting query and review time by over 90%.

roles.title: Team Leader / Coordinator & Master Scheduler, Supply Planning
roles.lesson: Leading people is its own supply chain: coordinating a team across borders while keeping supply intact under pressure.
highlights: Led a cross-functional planning team of 8 (from May 2024) across Sweden, Italy and China, resolving 15+ critical planning deviations monthly while protecting 180M+ EUR in annual revenue.
Owned mid-term master scheduling for 9 key products across 6 countries, pacing 2 internal factories and 12+ external suppliers in Sweden, Italy, Portugal, Austria, China and the USA.
Lifted supply availability from 85% to 98% through the semiconductor shortage via scenario planning and rapid replanning.
Improved on-time delivery 25% through capacity scenario modelling, master-data work, and structured demand/supply alignment.

roles.title: Jr. Supply Chain Specialist / Analyst, Global Supply Planning
roles.lesson: Where I learned the gap between what the data says and what the room decides.
highlights: Standardised the S&OP planning model globally across Commercial, Supply and Operations, the cross-functional foundation that fed Tetra Pak's 2020 S&OP rollout and later the IBP process.
Built long-term supply plans covering 25+ products through introduction and phase-out cycles.

education.institution: R. V. College of Engineering, Bangalore
